Te piden chaleco para cargar nafta apesar que la ley no está vigente. Atención pésima de los playeros para informarte.

(Translated by Google)
They require you to wear a vest to fill up your tank even though the law isn't in effect. The service from the attendants is terrible when it comes to providing information.
